MRI_scanner.Description: MRI scanner used for data acquisition

protocol_variant.Description: Protocol variant used to counterbalance task order. Four variants differ only in the random order of task presentation.

levels.A: rest TR1800, rest TR800, VOB TR1800, VisMot TR800, VOB TR800, VisMot TR1800
levels.B: rest TR800, rest TR1800, VOB TR800, VisMot TR1800, VOB TR1800, VisMot TR800
levels.C: rest TR1800, rest TR800, VisMot TR1800, VOB TR800, VisMot TR800, VOB TR1800
levels.D: rest TR800, rest TR1800, VisMot TR800, VOB TR1800, VisMot TR1800, VOB TR800
